summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelio v7.1 features. All 19 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified with all new v7.1 sections. Webhook signature verification tested with secret configured (403 for invalid, 200 for valid). GDPR consent flow working correctly. QR code confirmed to NOT contain passport number.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - Returns version 7.1
GET /api/health - Contains webhook_security field with signature_verification status
GET /api/health - Contains environment_modes field (duffel, mtn_momo, moov_money, stripe)
GET /api/health - Contains payment_operators with mode field for each operator
GET /api/health - Duffel shows SANDBOX mode (with placeholder key)
GET /api/health - Payment operators show MOCK mode (with placeholder keys)
GET /api/webhook - Verification works with correct token (hub.mode=subscribe)
GET /api/webhook - Verification fails with wrong token
POST /api/webhook - Works without signature in dev mode (no secret configured)
POST /api/webhook - Returns 403 when secret configured but signature missing
POST /api/webhook - Returns 403 when secret configured but signature invalid
POST /api/webhook - Returns 200 when secret configured and signature valid (HMAC-SHA256)
GDPR consent flow - New user gets awaiting_consent state on 'bonjour'
GDPR consent flow - Accept with '1' transitions to enrollment_method state
GDPR consent flow - Reject with '2' clears session
Returning user - Skips consent if passenger profile exists
QR verification endpoint - Returns valid=false for non-existent booking
Modification keyword 'modifier' recognized
Root endpoint returns version 7.1
Simulate endpoint handles missing message gracefully
Simulate endpoint returns session state
Booking flow starts correctly
frontend_tests_passed: Travelio header with WhatsApp Travel Booking Agent subtitle
Agent Online status with v7.1 version displayed
Payment Methods section with 4 operators (MTN MoMo, Moov Money, Google Pay, Apple Pay)
All payment operators show Mock status badge
Webhook Security section displayed with Signature Verification status
How It Works section mentions Duffel flights
Good dark theme with proper contrast
critical_code_review_comments: Webhook signature verification correctly implemented using HMAC-SHA256
GDPR consent flow properly gates new user enrollment
QR code data does NOT contain passport number (only ref, passenger name, route, date, verify URL)
Environment mode detection working correctly for Duffel and payment operators
Health endpoint properly exposes webhook_security and environment_modes fields
Modification flow correctly cancels original booking before rebooking (verified in code)

mocked_apis.note: All payment and flight APIs are MOCKED/SIMULATED in sandbox mode
mocked_list: Duffel GDS - SANDBOX mode (mock flights generated)
WhatsApp Cloud API - message sending logged, not sent

test_credentials: No auth required - test endpoints are open. Use POST /api/test/simulate with {phone, message}. Webhook verify token: travelio_verify_2024
seed_data_creation: Tests use unique phone numbers (+22990CONSENT1, +22990TEST01, etc.) for clean sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Travelio v7.1 testing complete. Key v7.1 features verified: (1) Webhook signature verification with WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK_SECRET - returns 403 for invalid/missing signatures when secret is set, (2) Health endpoint has new fields: webhook_security, environment_modes, payment_operators with modes, (3) GDPR consent flow for new users - state goes to awaiting_consent before enrollment_method, (4) QR code does NOT contain passport number, (5) Modification flow cancels original booking before rebooking, (6) All payment operators show MOCK mode, Duffel shows SANDBOX mode. To test webhook signature verification: set WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK_SECRET=test_secret_abc123 in .env, restart backend, test with HMAC-SHA256 signature.
